workspace-migration.summary: Migrated the workspace into the new local-brain layout and initialized Learning Ledger v1.

local-brain.summary: Wired QA standards routing into Explorer, Logger, Debugger, and auto orchestration so UI, API, automation, and test-data standards are read on-demand.
Completed agent, prompt, skill, and distilled-knowledge wiring for auto-learning and BPMN on-demand workflows.

transaction-mapping.summary: Reconciled Transaction Mapping state so verified product completion and persistence remain the source of truth while Approval Hierarchy stays documented as an automation caveat.
Validation testing complete - 8 required fields confirmed. Positive tests passed. Negative tests: special chars passed, duplicate name blocked by Approval Hierarchy automation issue.
CDP verification confirms Transaction Mapping persistence - items B027 and B029 appear in list with 'Waiting Approval' status. Post-submit JS error 'a is not a function' confirmed non-blocking.

Transaction Mapping create flow verified through manual testing - item B029 (test) created successfully and persisted in list with 'Waiting Approval' status. Items B027 (test QA Auto) and B029 confirmed in list.

Verified Transaction Mapping create persistence - created item 'test QA Auto' appears correctly in list with 'Waiting Approval' status. Confirmed post-submit JS error 'a is not a function' is non-blocking frontend issue.
Synchronized runtime and module knowledge after a manual Transaction Mapping create record reached Save, Submit, Confirm, and return-to-list.

Transaction Mapping.summary: Positive create test: 7/8 fields filled via CDP automation. Approval Hierarchy field cannot be automated due to lazy rendering (0x0 dimensions until scroll). This is an automation limitation, not a product bug.

global-brain.summary: Unified the workspace into a single Engineer role, added Playwright MCP, and upgraded recall memory with user preference capture.

monitoring-usage.summary: Validated USD-pricing accounts against Prabill usage and found zero current overlap despite populated usage table volume.

workspace-infra.summary: Added telegram_bug_reporter MCP and CLI dry-run/send workflow for group bug reporting with local-only Telegram token configuration.
Validated oracle_testdata guarded DML path with a rollback-only zero-row UPDATE smoke against PGNBILL.M_RBI_BILLING_ITEM; JDBC execution succeeded, affected_rows=0, committed=false.
Added guarded Oracle test-data DML tooling as a separate oracle_testdata MCP and added BPMN-vs-MoM testcase generation rules that require Playwright MCP evidence before confirming UI test steps.

tax-code.summary: Confirmed Tax Code condition-row bug: End Date auto-populates to Start Date after save even when End Date was not explicitly entered.

Executed Tax Code list-level functional checks via Playwright CDP: Advanced Search controls, Refresh, Create->Cancel->Confirm return, profile dropdown, Download List, and Column Settings all ran without visible product error; row-action/filter-target selectors showed intermittent automation timeout caveat.

telegram-reporting.summary: Telegram bug reporter accepts telegram-bug-reporter.env as a local secret config fallback and successfully sent a smoke-test message to the configured group.

opencode-memory.summary: Added project-local OpenCode custom commands for loading and saving AI-QA-LAB durable memory from the TUI.
Clarified OpenCode memory behavior: compact is session compaction, while durable learning requires session resume plus AI-QA-LAB memory, runtime handoff, and learning-ledger updates.

workspace-specification.summary: Generated root-level full specification for AI-QA-LAB covering workspace layout, Engineer agent capabilities, skills, prompts, commands, MCP integrations, runtime tools, knowledge sources, observability, safety guardrails, current VPN caveat, and recommended improvements.
